mapper.insert: insert into projects (route_id, owner_account_id, leader_account_id, title, departure_date, max_members, current_members, status) values (#{routeId}, #{ownerAccountId}, #{leaderAccountId}, #{title}, #{departureDate}, #{maxMembers}, #{currentMembers}, #{status})
mapper.update:
update projects
route_id = #{routeId},
owner_account_id = #{ownerAccountId},
leader_account_id = #{leaderAccountId},
title = #{title},
departure_date = #{departureDate},
max_members = #{maxMembers},
current_members = #{currentMembers},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, route_id, owner_account_id, leader_account_id, title, departure_date, max_members, current_members, status, created_at, updated_at from projects where id = #{id}
select id, route_id, owner_account_id, leader_account_id, title, departure_date, max_members, current_members, status, created_at, updated_at from projects
